creator: ohartman@mail.zedat.fu-berlin.de
text:
Updating/recompiling port graphics/visionworkbench fails updating/compiling due to the following compiler/linker error.

The box' OS is compiled using CLANG.

------

 CXX    make_ba_test_data.o
make_ba_test_data.cc: In function 'void write_control_network(boost::shared_ptr<vw::ba::ControlNetwork>, int, std::string, boost::filesystem2::path)':
make_ba_test_data.cc:997:30: warning: comparison between signed and unsigned integer expressions
make_ba_test_data.cc: In function 'void write_camera_models(CameraVector, std::string, boost::filesystem2::path)':
make_ba_test_data.cc:1051:36: warning: 'void vw::camera::PinholeModel::write_file(const std::string&) const' is deprecated (declared at /usr/ports/graphics/visionworkbench/work/VisionWorkbench-2.2.0/src/vw/Camera/PinholeModel.h:231)
  CXXLD  make_ba_test_data
Making all in test
  CXXLD  geotif-generate
/usr/lib/crt1.o: In function `_start':
/usr/src/lib/csu/amd64/crt1.c:(.text+0x81): undefined reference to `main'
collect2: ld returned 1 exit status
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/visionworkbench/work/VisionWorkbench-2.2.0/src/test.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/visionworkbench/work/VisionWorkbench-2.2.0/src.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/visionworkbench/work/VisionWorkbench-2.2.0.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/visionworkbench.

===>>> make failed for graphics/visionworkbench
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Update for graphics/visionworkbench failed
===>>> Aborting update

How-To-Repeat: try to compile/update port graphics/visionworkbench on a 9.0-CURRENT/amd64 with OS built using CLANG.
